calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Continued To Apr-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To Mar-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rita Tong, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court notes that Ms. Tong is accompanied by her husband Johnny Chang who will be assisting Ms. Tong with interpretation. The court advises Ms. Tong of the various issues posted by the assigned Examiner via the tentative ruling and that there have been no responses provided. The court advises Ms. Tong that she should consider seeking legal advice and points her to the San Francisco BAR Association for assistance.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Feb-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
